title: taxillus gibbosus
intro: Taxillus gibbosus, also known as Lichenostomella gibbosa, is a type of parasitic plant that belongs to the family Santalaceae. It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The medicinal properties of Taxillus gibbosus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Herbal preparations of Taxillus gibbosus, such as infusions or decoctions, have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, and may also provide cardiovascular and immune system benefits.
